crew_roles.name: Captain
crew_roles.description: Ultimate commander, responsible for the vessel, the crew, and the mission

crew_roles.name: Aether-Wright
crew_roles.description: Master technician and engineer, responsible for the Dragonstone core and coils

crew_roles.name: Navigator
crew_roles.description: Highly specialized expert who interprets the Jitter-Rig and other instruments to guide the vessel safely through Chaos Zones

crew_roles.name: Whisperer
crew_roles.description: Specialist who operates low-power emotional conduits to counteract crew panic, fear, or rage

propulsion_systems.name: Dragonstone Engine
propulsion_systems.description: Volatile yet essential material used in propulsion technology

navigational_systems.name: Jitter-Rig
navigational_systems.description: Primary means by which navigators read the ambient chaos of the skies

construction_methods.name: Coastal Empire
construction_methods.description: Resilient craft constructed from durable, shock-absorbing processed coral/chitin composite

construction_methods.name: Iron Caldera
construction_methods.description: Practical, mass-produced vessels constructed from terrestrial materials

construction_methods.name: Scute Confederacy
construction_methods.description: Agile, low-flying machetes constructed from chitin and scale-plate sourced from Insectoid or Reptilian kingdoms

construction_methods.name: Hive Commonwealth
construction_methods.description: Impressive, high-tech vessels constructed from unknown materials

classification.name: Cargo Caravan
classification.description: Massive, slow vessel designed for maximum lift capacity

classification.name: War Skiff
classification.description: Heavily armored vessel designed for military use

classification.name: Scout/Courier
classification.description: Small, high-agility vessel designed for reconnaissance and information network

classification.name: Sky-Barque
classification.description: Ornate, highly visible vessel designed for luxury and status

classification.name: Coil-Cutter
classification.description: Fast, light vessel designed for defense and ramming

classification.name: Deep-Diver
classification.description: Small, heavily shielded vessel designed for stable landing and retrieval in volatile zones
